narrative:
Brecksville-00-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,093 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
